expectations.text: Uses pypdf (PdfReader) or pdfplumber for extraction
expectations.evidence: Uses pdfplumber which is one of the accepted libraries

expectations.text: Iterates over all pages in the PDF
Saves extracted text to a .txt file
Handles the case where a PDF has no extractable text
expectations.evidence: Only checks individual pages with 'if text:' but doesn't handle the case where all pages return no text

eval_feedback.overall: Without-skill run 2 uses pdfplumber (acceptable) but misses the no-text handling
